title: BEM-684 mailbox watcher retry
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['scripts','.github/workflows','governance/reports','governance/state','governance/codex/proofs','governance/protocols','governance/telegram/outbox']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
watcher=Path('scripts/audit_mailbox_watcher.py')
watcher.write_text(r'''#!/usr/bin/env python3
import json
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone
from pathlib import Path
SEP='\n'
KYIV=timezone(timedelta(hours=3))
INBOUND=[Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt'),Path('governance/audit_mailbox/external_auditor_to_internal_auditor')]
STATE=Path('governance/state/audit_mailbox_watcher_state.json')
REPORT=Path('governance/reports/audit_mailbox_watcher_report.md')
OUT=Path('governance/telegram/outbox/audit_mailbox_notification.json')
ACTIVE=Path('governance/agreements/active')
def load(p):
    if not p.exists(): return {}
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8',errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: return {}
def decision(text):
    up=text.upper()
    if 'DECISION: APPROVE' in up or 'APPROVE' in up: return 'APPROVE'
    if 'CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up: return 'CHANGE_REQUIRED'
    if 'BLOCKED' in up: return 'BLOCKED'
    return 'MESSAGE'
def subject(text,path):
    for line in text.splitlines():
        s=line.strip('# ').strip()
        if s: return s[:140]
    return Path(path).name
now=datetime.now(KYIV).strftime('%Y-%m-%d | %H:%M (UTC+3)')
old=load(STATE); seen=set(old.get('seen_files',[])); items=[]
for d in INBOUND:
    if d.exists():
        for f in sorted(d.glob('*')):
            if f.is_file():
                t=f.read_text(encoding='utf-8',errors='ignore')
                items.append({'path':str(f),'size':f.stat().st_size,'decision':decision(t),'subject':subject(t,str(f))})
new=[x for x in items if x['path'] not in seen]
active=[]
if ACTIVE.exists():
    for f in sorted(ACTIVE.glob('*.json')):
        data=load(f); active.append({'path':str(f),'status':data.get('status'),'next_action':data.get('next_action')})
status='new_mail' if new else 'no_new_mail'
STATE.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
STATE.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'audit_mailbox_watcher_state.v1','status':status,'checked_at':now,'seen_files':[x['path'] for x in items],'new_items':new,'all_items':items,'active_agreements':active,'blocker':None},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+SEP,encoding='utf-8')
lines=['# Audit Mailbox Watcher','', 'Дата: '+now, '', 'Status: '+status, '', '## New items']
lines += [('- '+x['decision']+' | '+x['path']+' | '+x['subject']) for x in new] or ['none']
lines += ['', '## Active agreements']
lines += [('- '+str(x.get('status'))+' | '+x['path']+' | next: '+str(x.get('next_action'))) for x in active] or ['none']
REPORT.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True); REPORT.write_text(SEP.join(lines)+SEP,encoding='utf-8')
if new:
    OUT.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
    msg='BEM-MAILBOX | Ответ Claude получен\nДата: '+now+'\nНовых сообщений: '+str(len(new))+'\nРешение: '+new[-1]['decision']+'\nФайл: '+new[-1]['path']
    OUT.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'telegram_operator_notification.v1','type':'audit_mailbox_new_response','status':'pending_delivery','created_at':now,'message':msg,'items':new},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+SEP,encoding='utf-8')
print(json.dumps({'status':status,'new_items':len(new)},ensure_ascii=False))
''')
wf=Path('.github/workflows/audit-mailbox-watcher.yml')
wf.write_text(r'''name: Audit Mailbox Watcher

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    paths:
      - 'governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/**'
      - 'governance/audit_mailbox/external_auditor_to_internal_auditor/**'
      - 'governance/agreements/active/**'
      - 'scripts/audit_mailbox_watcher.py'
      - '.github/workflows/audit-mailbox-watcher.yml'

permissions:
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: audit-mailbox-watcher
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  audit-mailbox-watcher:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      - name: Syntax check watcher
        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/audit_mailbox_watcher.py
      - name: Run watcher
        run: python3 scripts/audit_mailbox_watcher.py
      - name: Commit watcher state
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/state/audit_mailbox_watcher_state.json governance/reports/audit_mailbox_watcher_report.md governance/telegram/outbox/audit_mailbox_notification.json
          git diff --cached --quiet && echo "No changes" || git commit -m "BEM-684 audit mailbox watcher state"
          git pull --rebase --autostash origin main || true
          git push || true
''')
protocol=Path('governance/protocols/AUDIT_MAILBOX_WATCHER_PROTOCOL.md')
protocol.write_text('# BEM-684 | Audit Mailbox Watcher Protocol'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 20:05 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Event-driven watcher listens to push changes in Claude inbound mailbox lanes and records state/report/operator notification outbox. No schedule trigger is used.'+sep)
text=wf.read_text(errors='ignore')
checks=[{'name':'script','pass':watcher.exists(),'evidence':str(watcher)},{'name':'workflow','pass':wf.exists(),'evidence':str(wf)},{'name':'no_schedule','pass':'schedule:' not in text,'evidence':str(wf)},{'name':'inbound_paths','pass':'governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/**' in text,'evidence':str(wf)}]
failed=[x for x in checks if not x['pass']]
status='pass' if not failed else 'failed'; blocker=None if status=='pass' else {'code':'WATCHER_PATCH_FAILED','failed':failed}
state={'schema_version':'event_mailbox_watcher_retry.v1','bem':'BEM-684','status':status,'checks':checks,'workflow':str(wf),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 20:05 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem684_event_mailbox_watcher_retry.json'); state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem684_event_mailbox_watcher_retry.md'); report.write_text('# BEM-684 | Event Mailbox Watcher Retry | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem684_event_mailbox_watcher_retry','status':status,'workflow':str(wf),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 20:05 (UTC+3)'},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json')
try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore')) if contour.exists() else {}
except Exception: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem684_event_mailbox_watcher_retry']={'status':status,'workflow':str(wf),'blocker':blocker}
contour_state['audit_mailbox_watcher']='event_driven_enabled' if status=='pass' else 'failed'
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 20:05 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem684_event_mailbox_watcher_retry.txt'); proof.write_text('BEM-684 '+status.upper()+': event-driven audit mailbox watcher installed.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(watcher),str(wf),str(protocol),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Installed event-driven audit mailbox watcher on push to Claude inbound mailbox lanes without schedule trigger')
"""
